_comment: Microsoft Entra External ID — combined sign-up + sign-in user flow. Substitutes the legacy Azure AD B2C custom policy 'B2C_1A_SignUpOrSignIn'. Apply via Microsoft Graph: POST /identity/authenticationEventsFlows.

onAuthenticationMethodLoadStart._comment: Three country-specific national-identity providers are listed first (in country order, alphabetically) so a citizen who selects 'country' on the attribute-collection screen sees their provider as the natural choice. EmailPassword-OAUTH stays as the fallback for cross-border / EU citizens reaching the service via the eIDAS bridge.

_todo_case_study_scaffold: Replace {{web-portal-app-id}} and {{mobile-app-id}} with the real app registration appIds in the External tenant.
Provision the eIDAS SAML bridge identity provider and substitute its id.
Deploy the token-augmentation custom authentication extension that injects 'country', 'eidasLoA' and 'nationalIdHash' claims, then substitute its id.
